unhostedWallets.notes: FME enforces EU TFR as EEA member. Threshold in EUR equivalent.

rules.notes: EU TFR (Regulation 2023/1113, https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1113/oj/eng) applies via EEA agreement. Zero threshold to all CASP-to-CASP crypto transfers from December 30, 2024 (Art. 38). Originator must provide name, account number, and one of: address + official document number + customer ID, OR date and place of birth (Art. 14(1)(d) — alternatives, not all mandatory simultaneously). EBA Q&A 2024_6969 addresses interpretation of the 'or alternatively' clause.
